segments.text: Drops the ledge, back to neutral!
segments.original_text: 崖を離して そして再びニュートラルの状態から

segments.text: Going for the landing—whoa, down air! What was that?
segments.original_text: 着地入れます おっと 空下した 今のは?

full_text: Drops the ledge, back to neutral! Going for the landing—whoa, down air! What was that?
